studies.title: Effectiveness of app-supported behavioral parent training with the hiToco®-app for attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder and oppositional defiant disorder

_verification.reason: The study specifically investigates the effectiveness of the hiToco®-app, which is explicitly named in both the title and the full text. The intervention described involves the use of the hiToco®-app to support behavioral parent training for ADHD and oppositional defiant disorder.

_classification.reason: The information provided indicates that this is a study protocol registered for a future trial, with no results yet available. It describes the planned investigation of an app-supported intervention but does not provide data or outcomes, making it ineligible as a primary RCT or RWE study.

studies._rejection_reason: The information provided indicates that this is a study protocol registered for a future trial, with no results yet available. It describes the planned investigation of an app-supported intervention but does not provide data or outcomes, making it ineligible as a primary RCT or RWE study.
